seoTitle: How to Buy a Domain on Cloudflare Registrar (2026)
metaDescription: Search, register, and buy a domain directly through Cloudflare Registrar at wholesale pricing, with free WHOIS privacy included by default.
intro: Cloudflare Registrar lets you buy domains directly at wholesale pricing without markup, and it comes with WHOIS privacy protection built in. This guide covers searching for a name, completing registration, and getting your new domain zone ready to configure.

steps.heading: Open Domain Registration
steps.body: From your Cloudflare dashboard, navigate to the Domain Registration section and click Register Domains.

steps.heading: Search for your domain name
steps.body: Type your desired brand name into the search box and review available extensions and pricing.

steps.heading: Select and purchase
steps.body: Choose your domain and click through to purchase at Cloudflare's wholesale rate.

steps.heading: Enter contact and billing details
steps.body: Fill in your registrant contact information, confirm your free WHOIS privacy protection, and add your billing information.

steps.heading: Confirm and manage your domain
steps.body: Click Confirm Purchase to complete registration, then review your new domain's control dashboard and auto-renew status.

faq.question: Does Cloudflare charge extra fees on top of the domain price?
faq.answer: Cloudflare Registrar sells domains at wholesale pricing without markup, unlike many registrars that add margin on top.

faq.question: Is WHOIS privacy included for free?
faq.answer: Yes, WHOIS privacy redaction is included by default when you register a domain through Cloudflare.

faq.question: Can I register any domain extension through Cloudflare?
faq.answer: Cloudflare supports many standard TLDs like .com, .net, and .org, though availability can vary by extension.

faq.question: What happens to auto-renewal after I purchase?
faq.answer: Your new domain's control dashboard lets you review and manage the auto-renew status to make sure it doesn't lapse unexpectedly.
